# .github

## Purpose

Repository automation and GitHub workflow configuration.

## Current Status

Active, now aligned to backend-first Nexus workflow checks.

## What Belongs Here

- CI workflows for lint/build/test
- container publishing workflows
- security scanning workflows

## What Does Not Belong Here

- workflows targeting removed repo surfaces
- workflow claims that imply production readiness by default

## Notes

Workflow existence does not indicate production readiness. Keep checks aligned with active repository structure and current architecture decisions.
